intro: Mystical friends met in dreams awaken in vibrant colors at my fingertips!
description:
The 'Crayon' series, responsible for children's creativity worldwide, finally arrives in the most mysterious world, <Crayon Magic World>! In this series, you can meet friends from the Magic World that only existed in imagination, including legendary unicorns, beautiful mermaids, brave dragons, and mysterious nine-tailed foxes.

Unleash your children's imagination with an intuitive interface that anyone can easily enjoy without complicated rules, and a variety of colors that perfectly capture the texture of real crayons. The sight of the fantastic characters you carefully colored coming to life will give children a special sense of accomplishment and a magical experience. Open the door to the Magic World now, the most beautiful digital sketchbook that offers both educational fun and emotional stability!
